## Validations
Shook: intensity, duration, frequency
Pulse: scale_min, scale_max, duration, loops
Flash: color, duration, loops
FadeIn: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
FadeOut: duration, from_opacity, to_opacity
SlideIn: direction, distance, duration
SlideOut: direction, distance, duration
ScalePop: target_scale, duration, bounce
ColorShift: to_color, duration
Spin: degrees, duration, loops

$primary, $secondary, $accent, $warning, $danger, $panel_bg,

results.prompt: Create a complete FPS HUD with health, ammo, and crosshair using sci-fi theme
results.generated:
WIDGET: WBP_PlayerHUD
THEME: SciFi

CANVAS Root
  VBOX Main
    HBOX Top
      TEXT: "Health"
      PROGRESS_BAR: percent=BIND:PlayerHealth/MaxHealth, fill_color=$health, bar_color=$surface
    HBOX Bottom
      TEXT: "Ammo"
      PROGRESS_BAR: percent=BIND:CurrentAmmo / MaxAmmo, fill_color=$warning, bar_color=$surface
  OVERLAY BottomRight
    SIZEBOX: size_x:32, size_y:32
    IMAGE: texture=Crosshair, color=$danger
VBOX Side
  HBOX Top
    TEXT: "Weapon: "
    TEXT: BIND:WeaponName
  HBOX Bott

results.prompt: Build an RPG HUD with health, mana, and XP bars in medieval theme
results.generated:
WIDGET: WBP_HUD
THEME: Medieval

CANVAS Root
  VBOX: HealthAndMana
    HBOX: HealthBar
      PROGRESS_BAR: BIND:Health/MaxHealth
        COLOR_SHIFT: to_color=$health
    HBOX: ManaBar
      PROGRESS_BAR: BIND:Mana/MaxMana
        COLOR_SHIFT: to_color=$mana
  SIZEBOX: size_x=20
  VBOX: XP
    HBOX: XPBar
      PROGRESS_BAR: BIND:XP/MaxXP
    TEXT: Level: BIND:Level
  SIZEBOX: size_x=40

CANVAS Root
  VBOX: Stats
    TEXT: Strength: BIND:Strength
    TEXT: Agility: BIND:Agility
    TEXT: Intelle

results.prompt: Create a sci-fi main menu with Play and Quit buttons
results.generated:
WIDGET: WBP_MainMenu
THEME: SciFi

CANVAS Root
  VBOX: menu_box
    SIZEBOX: sizebox
      TEXT: "Sci-Fi Game"
        font_size: 48
        color: $primary
    SIZEBOX: sizebox
      TEXT: "Main Menu"
        font_size: 24
        color: $text_secondary
        offset_y: 20
    HBOX: button_row
      BUTTON: play_button
        text: "Play"
        bind:visible: BIND:HasSaveGame
      BUTTON: quit_button
        text: "Quit"

## Valid Anchor Presets
TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Cen
